raw_consumer_statement:
Please see my previous complaint from XX/XX/XXXX. AmEx responded to you on XX/XX/XXXX. They LIED to you ( again, the third time! ) that this Dispute was closed in my favor and that monetary relief was provided. As of today, XX/XX/XXXX, this Dispute is still " In Progress '' ( open ), and the tentative resolution date is XX/XX/XXXX! Please see the attached. How many times would you accept a lie from AmEx? 
PLEASE help!
